docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MELISA MAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OLIVER MAR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2021 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MAR, OLIVER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY HALL, MELISA AS TO DEFENDANT MAR, OLIVER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
